description_long: This hardware store is a large, single-story commercial building with a prominent, hipped roof covered in grayish tiles. The main entrance is sheltered by a blue-tinted awning, and the facade features a wide, open area likely intended for customer access or display. Attached to the main structure is a secondary building with a gabled roof and a smaller, brown-roofed section, possibly for storage or office use. The exterior walls are primarily white and light gray, with some sections in darker tones, giving the building a clean, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible windows or signage, and the overall design is functional, with a focus on accessibility and space for goods handling.
description: A large, white and gray hardware store with a hipped roof, blue awning, and attached secondary structures, designed for practical commercial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a blue awning and the wide, open facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive hipped roof and the attached secondary building with a brown roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building and the smaller, attached structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building and the open entrance area under the roof.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a wide, open entrance area under a blue awning, with no visible windows or display areas. The facade is simple and functional, with attached secondary structures to one side.
